auth.label: API Token
auth.description: TikHub API token sent with the Authorization: Bearer header. Create it in the TikHub API key dashboard and grant only the platform path scopes needed by your actions.

actions.name: calculate_price
actions.description: Calculate TikHub daily request pricing for one endpoint. Requires the /api/v1/tikhub/user/ TikHub path scope.

endpoint.description: The TikHub endpoint path to inspect or price.

requestPerDay.description: The expected number of daily requests used for the price calculation.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for calculating TikHub endpoint pricing.

anyOf.description: The status-like code returned in the TikHub response body.
The TikHub request identifier when returned.
The TikHub response message when returned.
The TikHub router path reported by the response.
The request parameters echoed by TikHub when returned.

endpoint.description: The endpoint path used for the calculation.

requestPerDay.description: The daily request count used for the calculation.

price.description: The raw data payload returned by TikHub.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when calculating TikHub endpoint pricing.

actions.name: fetch_douyin_hot_total_list

pageSize.description: The number of hot-list items to return per page.

type.description: The billboard snapshot mode, such as snapshot or range.

snapshotTime.description: The snapshot timestamp formatted as yyyyMMddHHmmss.

startDate.description: The start date formatted as yyyyMMdd.

endDate.description: The end date formatted as yyyyMMdd.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for fetching the Douyin hot total list.

The request parameters echoed by TikHub when returned.

outputSchema.description: The response returned when fetching the Douyin hot total list.
